title: Conversation Practice — Self Introduction (Day 2)
description: 20 real-life conversation scenarios for practicing self-introduction. Each scenario has guided scripts, key phrases, and practice tasks.
howToUse: Apne baare mein same situation ka response prepare karein
Mirror ya partner ke saath practice karein

scenarios.title: Job Interview Opener
scenarios.context: HR asks: 'Please introduce yourself'
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning! My name is [Your Name]. I am from [City]. I completed my [Degree] from [College] in [Year] with [Score]. I have [X] years of experience in [Field]. My biggest strength is [Strength]. My goal is to [Goal]. I believe this role at your company is the perfect opportunity for me. Thank you for having me today.
practicePrompts: मुझे ___ साल का अनुभव है।
मेरी सबसे बड़ी strength ___ है।

scenarios.title: First Day Office Team Meeting
scenarios.context: Your manager says: 'Everyone, meet our new team member!'
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hello everyone! I am [Name], joining as [Role]. I have [X] years of experience in [Field]. Outside of work, I enjoy [Hobby]. I am really excited to be part of this amazing team and I look forward to working with all of you!
practicePrompts: मैं ___ के रूप में join कर रहा/रही हूँ।
मुझे ___ में ___ साल का अनुभव है।
मुझे ___ करना पसंद है।

scenarios.title: College First Day Introduction
scenarios.context: Professor says: 'Please introduce yourself to the class'
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hi everyone! I am [Name] from [City]. I completed my 12th with [%] in [Stream]. I love [Hobby1] and [Hobby2]. I want to become [Career] in the future. Nice to meet you all!
practicePrompts: मैंने 12th में ___ % marks लाए।
मेरा dream ___ बनना है।

scenarios.title: LinkedIn Connection Message
scenarios.context: You're sending a connection request with a note
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hi [Name]! I am [Your Name], a [Role] at [Company] with [X] years in [Industry]. I came across your profile and was really impressed by your work on [Topic]. I would love to connect and learn from your experience. Looking forward to connecting!
practicePrompts: मैं ___ हूँ और ___ में काम करता/करती हूँ।
मुझे आपके काम से बहुत inspiration मिलती है।
Connect करना चाहूंगा/चाहूंगी।
tips: Mention why you want to connect specifically

scenarios.title: Video Call with International Client
scenarios.context: First Zoom call with a client from the US or UK
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning/afternoon from [City]! I am [Name], [Designation] at [Company]. I have [X] years of experience managing international projects in [Industry]. I successfully [achievement]. I am really looking forward to working with [Client Company] on this exciting project.
practicePrompts: मैं ___ में based हूँ।
मुझे international projects का अनुभव है।
मैं इस project के लिए excited हूँ।
tips: Time zone ke hisab se greeting

scenarios.title: Family Wedding — Meeting Relatives
scenarios.context: A relative you've never met asks: 'Tum kaun ho beta?'
scenarios.sampleResponse: Namaste, [Uncle/Aunty]! I am [Name], [Relation]'s son/daughter. I am [age] years old. I am currently [working as/studying] at [Company/College]. It is wonderful to meet you!
practicePrompts: मैं ___ में काम करता/करती हूँ।
आपसे मिलकर अच्छा लगा।

scenarios.title: Networking Event Business Card Exchange
scenarios.context: You meet someone and exchange business cards
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hi! I am [Name]. Here's my card. I am the [Designation] at [Company]. We [what your company does in one sentence]. I am particularly interested in [relevant interest/challenge]. What do you do?
practicePrompts: यह मेरा card है।
हम ___ के लिए work करते हैं।
आप क्या करते हैं?
tips: One interesting fact about your work

scenarios.title: WhatsApp Group Introduction
scenarios.context: You join a new professional community or study group
scenarios.sampleResponse:
Hello everyone! 👋

I am [Name] from [City]. I work as [Role] at [Company] / I am currently pursuing [Degree].

I joined this group because [reason — e.g., to improve English, to connect with professionals].

Fun fact: [Something interesting about you — e.g., 'I have visited 12 states in India!']

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you! 😊
practicePrompts: मैं इस group में join हुआ/हुई क्योंकि ___।
Fun fact: मैं ___।
सबसे मिलकर अच्छा लगेगा।
tips: Mention why you joined — it builds connection

scenarios.title: English Class First Day
scenarios.context: Teacher asks everyone to introduce themselves
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good [time], everyone! My name is [Name]. I am from [City]. I [work as/am studying]. I am learning English because [reason]. My goal is to [specific English-related goal]. I hope to improve a lot with all your help!
practicePrompts: मैं English इसलिए सीख रहा/रही हूँ क्योंकि ___।
मेरा English सीखने का goal ___ है।
मुझे hope है कि मैं जल्दी improve करूंगा/करूंगी।
tips: Be specific about your English goal

scenarios.title: Doctor / Hospital Introduction
scenarios.context: You are registering at a new clinic for the first time
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning, Doctor. My name is [Name]. My date of birth is [date]. I am from [City]. I currently work as [Occupation]. I am here because [reason — e.g., I have been experiencing back pain for 2 weeks].
practicePrompts: मेरी date of birth ___ है।
मैं पिछले ___ से ___ का सामना कर रहा/रही हूँ।
मेरा permanent address ___ है।
tips: Mention how long you've had the issue

scenarios.title: University Admission Interview
scenarios.context: Panel of professors asks you to introduce yourself
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning, respected faculty! My name is [Name]. I am from [City]. I scored [%] in my 12th and [CGPA] in my graduation from [College]. I have always been deeply interested in [Subject] because [reason]. My goal is to [career goal]. I am applying to [University] because of its exceptional [faculty/research/ranking/opportunities]. I believe this program will shape my future in the best way possible. Thank you for this opportunity.
practicePrompts: मुझे ___ subject में गहरी रुचि है क्योंकि ___।
इस university में apply करने का मेरा कारण ___ है।
मेरा goal है ___ बनना।
tips: Connect your interests to the course

scenarios.title: Bank Account Opening
scenarios.context: Bank officer asks for your details
scenarios.sampleResponse: My name is [Full Name]. My date of birth is [date]. My permanent address is [full address]. I currently reside in [current city] due to work. I am a [occupation] at [company]. My income is from my salary / business / profession.
practicePrompts: मेरा permanent address ___ है।
मैं currently ___ में रहता/रहती हूँ।
मेरी income [salary/business/profession] से है।

scenarios.title: Conference Panel Introduction
scenarios.context: You are a speaker at an industry conference
scenarios.sampleResponse:
Good morning, ladies and gentlemen! I am honoured to be here today. My name is [Name], and I serve as the [Designation] at [Organization], based in [City].

Over the past [X] years, I have dedicated my career to [field/mission]. I started as [early role] and progressed to [current role], gaining deep expertise in [areas].

Today, I will be speaking about [topic], a subject I am deeply passionate about. I hope my experience and insights will be valuable to each one of you. Let us begin!
practicePrompts: मुझे यहाँ आने का honor मिला है।
आज मैं ___ के बारे में बात करूंगा/करूंगी।
tips: Make audience feel you are credible and relevant

scenarios.title: Social Media Live Stream Start
scenarios.context: Starting your first Instagram/YouTube Live
scenarios.sampleResponse:
Hey hey hey! We are LIVE! Oh wow, this is exciting! For those of you who are new here — hi! I am [Name] from [City]. This page is all about [topic — e.g., English learning / technology / cooking].

I started this because [personal reason]. Today, we are going to [today's topic]. It will be fun, practical, and easy to understand.

If you are new, please follow and hit the notification bell! And drop your name in the comments — I want to say hi to everyone!
practicePrompts: आज हम ___ के बारे में बात करेंगे।
मैंने यह page/channel इसलिए शुरू किया क्योंकि ___।
Comments में अपना नाम likho!
tips: Be genuine — people connect with real people

scenarios.title: Client Proposal Meeting — First Meeting
scenarios.context: You meet a potential client for the first time in a formal business meeting
keyStructure: Company overview (what you do, for whom)
Why you are the right choice
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning, Mr./Ms. [Client Name]. Thank you for taking the time to meet with us today. My name is [Name], and I am the [Designation] at [Your Company]. We are a [type of company] that specializes in [services/products] for [target clients]. Our team has [X] years of combined experience, and we have successfully delivered [specific projects or results]. We recently helped [a similar client] achieve [specific outcome], and I believe we can do something similar for your organization. I am excited about the possibility of working together and I look forward to understanding your needs better today.
practicePrompts: हम एक ___ company हैं जो ___ में specialize करती है।
हमने recently ___ client के लिए ___ achieve किया।
मैं आपकी needs को समझना चाहता/चाहती हूँ।
tips: Research the client before the meeting

scenarios.title: Phone Call to Potential Employer
scenarios.context: You are calling to inquire about a job opening
keyStructure: Confirm you have the right person
Your name + why you are calling
How you found out about the opening
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning! Am I speaking with [HR Manager's name] from [Company]? My name is [Your Name]. I am calling regarding the [Job Title] opening I found on [Job Portal/LinkedIn]. I am a [Designation] with [X] years of experience in [Field]. I am very interested in this opportunity and would love to know more about the position. Would it be possible to schedule a brief conversation at your convenience?
practicePrompts: क्या मैं ___ से बात कर रहा/रही हूँ?
मैं ___ job opening के बारे में call कर रहा/रही हूँ।
क्या हम एक brief conversation schedule कर सकते हैं?
tips: Prepared raho — answers ke liye ready raho
Always ask for a next step

scenarios.title: Government Office / Formal Inquiry
scenarios.context: You visit a government or official office for the first time
scenarios.sampleResponse: Good morning, sir/ma'am. My name is [Full Name]. My Aadhaar number is [XXXX]. I am here for [purpose — e.g., passport verification, certificate attestation]. I have all the required documents with me. Could you please guide me on the process?
practicePrompts: मैं ___ के लिए यहाँ आया/आई हूँ।
मेरे पास सभी documents हैं।
क्या आप मुझे process बता सकते हैं?

scenarios.title: Introducing Yourself in an Email
scenarios.context: You are reaching out cold to a professional you admire
scenarios.sampleResponse:
Subject: Introduction + Quick Question — [Your Name]

Dear [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. My name is [Your Name], a [Role] at [Company/College]. I came across your [article/LinkedIn post/interview] on [Topic] and found it truly insightful.

I have been working in [Field] for [X] years and am currently focused on [specific challenge]. I believe your experience in [their area] could offer invaluable perspective.

Would you be open to a 15-minute call or email exchange at your convenience? I would be truly grateful for any guidance.

Warm regards,
[Name]
practicePrompts: मैंने आपका [article/interview] पढ़ा और बहुत inspire हुआ/हुई।
मैं currently ___ पर काम कर रहा/रही हूँ।
क्या आप 15 minutes के लिए available होंगे?
tips: Mention specifically why you are reaching out to THEM

scenarios.title: Sports / Hobby Club Introduction
scenarios.context: First day at a new hobby class — cooking, yoga, cricket, or art
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hi everyone! I am [Name] from [City]. I am a complete beginner / I have [X] months of experience in [hobby]. I joined because [reason]. One fun thing — [interesting fact about yourself related to the hobby]. Looking forward to learning with all of you!
practicePrompts: मैं इस class में join हुआ/हुई क्योंकि ___।
मुझे ___ में ___ महीने/साल का अनुभव है।
एक fun fact: ___।
tips: Be honest about your skill level

scenarios.title: Self Introduction for a School/College Project
scenarios.context: You start a group project and introduce yourself to your group members
scenarios.sampleResponse: Hey guys! I am [Name] from [Branch/Stream]. For this project, I can contribute to [specific areas — e.g., research, presentation, coding]. I am particularly good at [skill]. I am really excited about this project because [reason]. Let us do great work together!
practicePrompts: इस project में मैं ___ में contribute कर सकता/सकती हूँ।
मुझे ___ में अच्छा experience है।
मैं इस project के लिए excited हूँ क्योंकि ___।

week1.day3: Scenarios 11-15: University + bank + conference + social media + client
week1.day4: Scenarios 16-20: Phone + government + email + hobby + project
week1.day6: Full round — all 20 scenarios in 60 minutes
week1.day7: Record yourself for scenarios 1, 5, 13, 20 and review

keyPhrasesSummary: My name is ___ and I am from ___.
I have [X] years of experience in ___.
I look forward to working with you.
It is a pleasure to meet you.
I am excited about this opportunity.
Thank you for having me today.
